hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 任命了美联储特别工作组成员，其中包括马克·安德森 (Marc Andreessen)、道格·麦克米伦 (Doug McMillon)；【FINANCE】会议记录显示，美联储官员在上次会议上对利率方向存在分歧；【FINANCE】美联储会议纪要显示利率问题上的“家庭斗争”。争吵可能会持续一段时间。

items.title: Kevin Warsh names members of his Federal Reserve task forces, including Marc Andreessen, Doug McMillon
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh on Thursday released names of the experts who will comprise five task forces to examine the institution's operations.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 任命了美联储特别工作组成员，其中包括马克·安德森 (Marc Andreessen)、道格·麦克米伦 (Doug McMillon)
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什周四公布了专家名单，这些专家将组成五个工作组来检查该机构的运作。

items.title: Fed officials were split on direction of interest rates at last meeting, minutes show
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released minutes from its June 16-17 meeting.
items.title_zh: 会议记录显示，美联储官员在上次会议上对利率方向存在分歧
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三发布了 6 月 16 日至 17 日会议纪要。

items.title: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
items.summary: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.
items.title_zh: 美联储会议纪要显示利率问题上的“家庭斗争”。争吵可能会持续一段时间
items.summary_zh: 在过去 35 年左右的时间里，美联储只进行一次利率调整的情况很少见，无论是上调还是下调。

items.title: Housing bill that includes a CBDC ban passed into law without Trump’s signature
items.summary: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which includes a provision that bans the Fed from issuing a CBDC, has become law.
items.title_zh: 包含 CBDC 禁令的住房法案未经特朗普签署就通过成为法律
items.summary_zh: 《21 世纪住房之路法案》已成为法律，其中包括禁止美联储发行 CBDC 的条款。

items.title: New method aims to keep kids safe from illegal AI-generated content
items.summary: Researchers developed an auditing technique to test generative AI models for malicious capabilities, without prompting them for illegal outputs.
items.title_zh: 新方法旨在保护孩子免受非法人工智能生成内容的侵害
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种审计技术来测试生成人工智能模型的恶意功能，而不提示它们进行非法输出。

items.title: Bitcoin holds near $63,800 as war-driven selloff hits everything but crypto
items.summary: Gold, oil, stocks and bonds all moved sharply on the fourth round of U.S. strikes on Iran, but bitcoin is little-changed.
items.title_zh: 战争驱动的抛售打击了除加密货币以外的所有资产，比特币维持在 63,800 美元附近
items.summary_zh: 美国对伊朗进行第四轮打击后，黄金、石油、股票和债券均大幅波动，但比特币变化不大。

items.title: Michael Saylor posts cryptic Strategy chart after $216 million bitcoin sale: ‘Orange dots tell only part of the story’
items.summary: Strategy holds 843,775 BTC at an average cost of $75,476, leaving the position roughly $9.7 billion underwater with bitcoin trading near $64,000.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·塞勒 (Michael Saylor) 在出售 2.16 亿美元的比特币后发布了神秘的策略图表：“橙色点只讲述了故事的一部分”
items.summary_zh: Strategy 持有 843,775 BTC，平均成本为 75,476 美元，使该仓位水下约 97 亿美元，而比特币交易价格接近 64,000 美元。

items.title: Hedera lending protocol Bonzo Lend hit for $9 million after Supra verifier accepts manipulated price update
items.summary: A second wallet borrowed another roughly $1 million but identified itself as a white hat hacker and said the funds would be returned.
items.title_zh: Supra 验证者接受操纵价格更新后，Hedera 借贷协议 Bonzo Lend 损失 900 万美元
items.summary_zh: 第二个钱包又借了大约 100 万美元，但自称是白帽黑客，并表示将退还资金。

items.title: Bitcoin, ether ETFs snap eight-week outflow streaks with $282 million combined inflow
items.summary: The preceding eight weeks drained a combined $9.46 billion from the two groups, meaning this week’s rebound recovered only about 3% of those outflows.
items.title_zh: 比特币、以太坊 ETF 结束连续八周的资金流出，流入总额达 2.82 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 过去八周，这两个类别总共流出了 94.6 亿美元，这意味着本周的反弹仅收回了流出量的约 3%。

items.title: Tiny robot boats build floating structures
items.summary: MIT researchers developed FloatForm, a swarm of small aquatic robots that snap together like ants forming a raft, assembling into reconfigurable structures on the water.
items.title_zh: 微型机器人船建造浮动结构
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了 FloatForm，这是一群小型水生机器人，它们像蚂蚁形成木筏一样聚集在一起，在水上组装成可重新配置的结构。

items.title: How novice coders can develop AI programs for military applications
items.summary: A USAF cadet and a Lincoln Laboratory researcher found AI chatbots can help nontechnical service members produce viable software applications for their unique problems.
items.title_zh: 新手程序员如何开发军事应用的人工智能程序
items.summary_zh: 一名美国空军学员和一名林肯实验室研究人员发现，人工智能聊天机器人可以帮助非技术服务人员针对其独特问题开发可行的软件应用程序。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: These underperforming trades could yield big returns over next six months
items.summary: ETF Action's Mike Akins is encouraging investors to boost exposure to groups that underperformed compared with major artificial intelligence stocks.
items.title_zh: 这些表现不佳的交易可能会在未来六个月内产生丰厚回报
items.summary_zh: ETF Action 的迈克·阿金斯 (Mike Akins) 鼓励投资者增加对那些与主要人工智能股票相比表现不佳的股票的投资。

items.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
items.summary: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.
items.title_zh: 中国通过 Anthropic 的克劳德代码警告人工智能风险
items.summary_zh: 中国表示，克劳德代码的特定版本存在后门漏洞，可以将敏感信息发送到远程服务器。

items.title: At least 27 killed, eight critically injured in Bangkok bar fire
items.summary: Firefighters arrived at the scene in the Chatuchak district to find patrons running through flames to escape.
items.title_zh: 曼谷酒吧火灾 至少27人死亡、8人重伤
items.summary_zh: 消防队员到达乍都乍地区的现场，发现顾客正在冒着火焰逃跑。

items.title: Hard-Liners in Iran Want to Keep Fighting America
items.summary: With much of their leadership killed in the war, Iran’s conservatives have sought to fill the void and intensify the fight against the United States.
items.title_zh: 伊朗强硬派希望继续与美国作战
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗的许多领导人在战争中丧生，伊朗保守派一直在寻求填补空白并加大对美国的打击力度。

items.title: Zelensky Announces Leadership Shuffle as War Turns in Ukraine’s Favor
items.summary: President Volodymyr Zelensky said Ukraine’s prime minister, Yuliia Svyrydenko, would step down amid a broader shake-up in Ukraine’s senior leadership.
items.title_zh: 随着战争对乌克兰有利，泽连斯基宣布领导层洗牌
items.summary_zh: 总统弗拉基米尔·泽伦斯基表示，乌克兰总理尤利娅·斯维里登科将在乌克兰高级领导层更广泛的改组中辞职。

items.title: Lindsey Graham Championed Israel, Even as Wars Eroded American Support
items.summary: The Republican senator from South Carolina had an intense interest in the Middle East, and was a staunch supporter of U.S. strikes on Iran.
items.title_zh: 林赛·格雷厄姆支持以色列，尽管战争削弱了美国的支持
items.summary_zh: 这位来自南卡罗来纳州的共和党参议员对中东有着浓厚的兴趣，并且是美国打击伊朗的坚定支持者。

items.title: How Putin Turned Japan Into a Den of Spies
items.summary: Operating out of a Tokyo high-rise, a military intelligence unit finds the high-tech equipment that Russia needs to wage war.
items.title_zh: 普京如何将日本变成间谍巢穴
items.summary_zh: 军事情报部门在东京的一座高层建筑中运作，寻找俄罗斯发动战争所需的高科技设备。

items.title: Bitcoin, ether little changed as U.S. launches fresh Iran strikes
items.summary: The U.S. hit Iran for the third time this week and Tehran has reportedly closed the Strait of Hormuz again.
items.title_zh: 随着美国对伊朗发动新的打击，比特币、以太币几乎没有变化
items.summary_zh: 美国本周第三次袭击伊朗，据报道德黑兰再次关闭了霍尔木兹海峡。

items.title: PRX Part 4: Our Data Strategy
items.title_zh: PRX 第 4 部分：我们的数据策略

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领袖举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Toward a future that preserves benefits of neurotechnology for all
items.summary: PhD student Rachel Sava, winner of the Envisioning the Future of Computing Prize, explores transformative improvements and dystopian risks of neural technology.
items.title_zh: 迈向一个让所有人都能受益于神经技术的未来
items.summary_zh: 博士生 Rachel Sava 是“展望计算未来”奖的获得者，她探索了神经技术的变革性改进和反乌托邦风险。

items.title: Live Updates: Cease-Fire Unraveling as U.S. and Iran Trade Strikes Again
items.summary: The U.S. military said that it had hit dozens of Iranian targets in its latest salvo. Iran’s army said that it had fired more drones at American military sites in the region, as the two sides tussle over the Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：随着美国和伊朗贸易再次打击，停火协议瓦解
items.summary_zh: 美国军方表示，在最近的一次齐射中，它击中了数十个伊朗目标。伊朗军方表示，在双方围绕霍尔木兹海峡发生争执之际，伊朗军方向该地区的美国军事基地发射了更多无人机。

items.title: Bitcoin is nearing a power law support line Fidelity has tracked since 2015
items.summary: The group's Dir. of Global Macro Jurien Timmer calls it an accumulation zone but notes the lack of a catalyst to bounce yet.
items.title_zh: 比特币正接近富达自 2015 年以来追踪的幂律支撑线
items.summary_zh: 该小组的 Dir.全球宏观分析师朱里安·蒂默（Jurien Timmer）将其称为积累区，但指出目前还缺乏反弹的催化剂。

items.title: Bitcoin’s BIP 110 fork deadline nears with miner support at zero
items.summary: The BIP 110 proposal would cap arbitrary data on Bitcoin for a year, but Saylor, Adam Back and others say turning a spam dispute into a consensus fight could create a bigger risk than the spam itself.
items.title_zh: 比特币 BIP 110 分叉截止日期临近，矿工支持为零
items.summary_zh: BIP 110 提案将限制比特币上的任意数据一年，但 Saylor、Adam Back 和其他人表示，将垃圾邮件争议转变为共识之争可能会产生比垃圾邮件本身更大的风险。

items.title: Bitcoin whale moves $188 million in BTC after seven-year dormancy: onchain data
items.summary: The whale last moved bitcoin in 2018, when the cryptocurrency traded at roughly $6,475, reflecting nearly a tenfold gain since then.
items.title_zh: 比特币鲸鱼在休眠七年后转移了 1.88 亿美元的 BTC：链上数据
items.summary_zh: 鲸鱼最后一次转移比特币是在 2018 年，当时加密货币的交易价格约为 6,475 美元，自那时以来上涨了近十倍。

items.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6 现在是 Microsoft 365 Copilot 中的首选模型
items.summary_zh: 了解 GPT-5.6 如何为 Microsoft 365 Copilot 提供更强大的跨 Word、Excel、PowerPoint、Chat 和 Cowork 的 AI 功能，从而实现更快、更高质量的工作。

items.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.
items.title_zh: 我们与政府和国家安全伙伴关系的方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何处理政府和国家安全伙伴关系，以及负责任的人工智能使用、民主问责和公共安全的原则。

items.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
items.summary: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
items.title_zh: 在编码评估中将信号与噪声分离
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 的一项新分析揭示了流行的编码基准 SWE-Bench Pro 中的问题，引发了人们对评估 AI 模型的可靠性和准确性的担忧。

items.title: Introducing GPT-Live
items.summary: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.
items.title_zh: GPT-Live 简介
items.summary_zh: 用于自然人机交互的新一代语音模型，现已为 ChatGPT 语音提供支持。

items.title: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
items.title_zh: 本机速度 vLLM 变压器建模后端

items.title_zh: Foundry 托管计算上的拥抱脸部模型

items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026

items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Jesse Thaler named director of the Laboratory for Nuclear Science
items.summary: The professor of physics and inaugural director of the NSF AI Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Fundamental Interactions will lead LNS and continue his research in particle physics.
items.title_zh: 杰西·泰勒被任命为核科学实验室主任
items.summary_zh: 这位物理学教授兼 NSF AI 人工智能和基础相互作用研究所首任所长将领导 LNS 并继续他在粒子物理学方面的研究。

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: Prediction markets spark insider trading concerns. Here's how Goldman and other companies are responding
items.summary: CNBC reached out to 50 companies about what are their trading policies for employees on prediction markets. A handful had an answer.
items.title_zh: 预测市场引发内幕交易担忧。以下是高盛和其他公司的回应
items.summary_zh: CNBC 联系了 50 家公司，了解他们在预测市场上的员工交易政策。少数人给出了答案。

items.title: Kalshi traders think gas prices will stay higher for longer as U.S.-Iran tensions heat back up
items.summary: Odds that gas prices are above $3.50 on Election Day have jumped to 75% on the platform.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商认为，随着美伊紧张局势升温，天然气价格将在更长时间内保持较高水平
items.summary_zh: 在该平台上，选举日汽油价格高于 3.50 美元的可能性已跃升至 75%。

items.title: Goldman Sachs wins $70 billion in asset management deals with Verizon, Lockheed Martin
items.summary: Competition in the multitrillion-dollar market for retirement assets is fierce among managers such as Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, Russell Investments and Mercer.
items.title_zh: 高盛与 Verizon、Lockheed Martin 赢得 700 亿美元资产管理交易
items.summary_zh: 高盛、贝莱德、罗素投资和美世等管理公司在数万亿美元的退休资产市场上的竞争非常激烈。

items.title: Michael Burry bets on sportsbooks DraftKings and Flutter, sees prediction markets curbed by regulation
items.summary: The investor believes regulators will eventually crack down on prediction markets after competition from the upstarts pressured the stocks of sportsbooks.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 押注体育博彩公司 DraftKings 和 Flutter，认为预测市场受到监管限制
items.summary_zh: 该投资者认为，在新贵的竞争给体育博彩公司的股票带来压力之后，监管机构最终将打击预测市场。

items.title: Strait of Hormuz traffic won't return to normal until 2027 after latest setback, Kalshi traders predict
items.summary: Speculators now see just a 43% chance that traffic flows return to normal by Dec. 1.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商预测，在经历了最近的挫折后，霍尔木兹海峡的交通要到 2027 年才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 投机者现在认为交通流量在 12 月 1 日之前恢复正常的可能性只有 43%。

items.title: US and Iran trade fire as tensions rise over Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Within hours of fresh US attacks, Iran said it had struck US military bases in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain.
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势升级，美国和伊朗交火
items.summary_zh: 在美国发动新一轮袭击后数小时内，伊朗表示袭击了美国在科威特、约旦和巴林的军事基地。

items.title: US senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
items.summary: A spokesman for the 71-year-old South Carolina senator says initial findings suggest Graham's cause of death was related to his heart.
items.title_zh: 美国参议员兼特朗普亲密盟友林赛·格雷厄姆因“短暂且突发的疾病”去世
items.summary_zh: 这位 71 岁的南卡罗来纳州参议员的发言人表示，初步调查结果表明格雷厄姆的死因与心脏有关。

items.title: British couple return to village at heart of deadly Spanish wildfire
items.summary: At least 13 people, including five believed to be Britons, were killed by Thursday's wildfire in Spain's Almeria province.
items.title_zh: 英国夫妇返回西班牙致命野火中心的村庄
items.summary_zh: 周四西班牙阿尔梅里亚省的野火造成至少 13 人死亡，其中 5 人据信是英国人。

items.title: Planes sent to tackle wildfires of 'exceptional scale' near Paris
items.summary: It was the first time firefighting planes had been sent up from the normally drier and hotter south of the country to tackle fires in the Paris region.
items.title_zh: 飞机被派去扑灭巴黎附近“异常规模”的野火
items.summary_zh: 这是消防飞机首次从通常较为干燥和炎热的南部地区派出前往巴黎地区扑灭火灾。

items.title: Anthony Zurcher: From Trump critic to ally, Lindsey Graham was a political survivor of the Maga era
items.summary: The senator's career was marked by a willingness to adapt to America's dramatically changing political climate, writes the BBC's North America correspondent.
items.title_zh: 安东尼·祖彻：从特朗普批评者到盟友，林赛·格雷厄姆是马加时代的政治幸存者
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司驻北美记者写道，这位参议员职业生涯的特点是愿意适应美国急剧变化的政治气候。

items.title: US Senator Mitch McConnell says absence due to fall and pneumonia
items.summary: The veteran Republican says he will not return to work "quite yet", in his first statement following weeks of speculation about his health.
items.title_zh: 美国参议员米奇·麦康奈尔因跌倒和肺炎缺席
items.summary_zh: 这位资深共和党人在数周对其健康状况进行猜测后的首次声明中表示，他“暂时”不会重返工作岗位。

items.title: China evacuates nearly two million people as powerful typhoon makes landfall
items.summary: Schools, work and outdoor activities have been suspended in Zhejiang province and many transport services cancelled.
items.title_zh: 强台风登陆中国疏散近200万人
items.summary_zh: 浙江省的学校、工作和户外活动已暂停，许多交通服务也被取消。

items.title: T. rex could become most expensive fossil ever - but it's a ​problem for scientists
items.summary: A 67 million-year-old Tyrannosaurus rex will go on sale in New York with a pre-sale value of $30m.
items.title_zh: 霸王龙可能成为有史以来最昂贵的化石 - 但这对科学家来说是一个问题
items.summary_zh: 一只拥有 6700 万年历史的霸王龙将在纽约拍卖，预售价为 3000 万美元。

items.title: Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani dies aged 74
items.summary: He took power in 1996 after staging a bloodless coup against his father, and went on to transform Qatar into the gas-rich power it is today.
items.title_zh: 卡塔尔前埃米尔谢赫哈马德·本·哈利法·阿勒萨尼去世，享年 74 岁
items.summary_zh: 1996 年，他发动了一场针对其父亲的不流血政变后掌权，并继续将卡塔尔转变为今天的天然气资源丰富的国家。

items.title: Residents of Spanish Towns Caught in Fierce Blazes Recount Harrowing Escapes
items.summary: Many say communication was chaotic and even nonexistent as flames tore through the area, taking 12 lives in one of the deadliest wildfires on record in Spain.
items.title_zh: 陷入大火的西班牙城镇居民讲述悲惨的逃生经历
items.summary_zh: 许多人表示，火势席卷整个地区，通讯十分混乱，甚至根本不存在，这是西班牙有记录以来最致命的野火之一，造成 12 人死亡。

items.title: How Trump Failed to Secure the Strait of Hormuz in His Iran Deal
items.summary: President Trump signed an agreement that Iran said gave it control of the waterway — and global energy supplies. Now, Iran’s military is violently asserting authority.
items.title_zh: 特朗普为何未能在伊朗协议中确保霍尔木兹海峡的安全
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统签署了一项协议，伊朗称该协议使其控制了该水道以及全球能源供应。现在，伊朗军方正在暴力维护权威。

items.title: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa, Ruler Who Transformed Qatar, Dies at 74
items.summary: Under Sheikh Hamad, the tiny nation of Qatar developed immense natural gas wealth and cultivated influence far beyond its borders.
items.title_zh: 改变卡塔尔的统治者谢赫哈马德·本·哈利法去世，享年 74 岁
items.summary_zh: 在谢赫哈马德的领导下，卡塔尔这个小国开发了巨大的天然气财富，并在境外建立了影响力。

items.title: At World Cup Ticket Prices, Even Messi Can’t Fill a Stadium
items.summary: The Argentine team and its superstar, Lionel Messi, have been among the biggest draws at the World Cup, but that was not enough to prevent vacant seats at its quarterfinal on Saturday.
items.title_zh: 按照世界杯票价，即使是梅西也无法填满一个体育场
items.summary_zh: 阿根廷队及其超级巨星梅西是世界杯上最吸引人的球队之一，但这并不足以阻止周六四分之一决赛的空座。

items.title: As India Erases Its Colonial Past, Delhi’s Elite Feel Targeted
items.summary: India’s government wants to shut down Delhi’s Gymkhana Club, which the prime minister calls a vestige of colonialism. Some members suspect a different motive.
items.title_zh: 随着印度抹去其殖民历史，德里的精英们感到自己成为了目标
items.summary_zh: 印度政府希望关闭德里的体育俱乐部，总理称该俱乐部是殖民主义的残余。一些成员怀疑有不同的动机。

items.title: Stablecoin market cap has shrunk by $10 billion since May, but analyst sees no reason to panic
items.summary: The market shrank by $7.7 billion in June alone, the largest dollar amount since May 2022's Terra-Luna crash, but stablecoins will likely resume their long-term growth, one analyst said.
items.title_zh: 自 5 月份以来，稳定币市值已缩水 100 亿美元，但分析师认为没有理由恐慌
items.summary_zh: 一位分析师表示，仅 6 月份市场就缩水了 77 亿美元，这是自 2022 年 5 月 Terra-Luna 崩盘以来的最大金额，但稳定币可能会恢复长期增长。

items.title: Ripple once weighed shutting down and handing XRP to shareholders, CEO says
items.summary: Ripple's Brad Garlinghouse says he and co-founder Chris Larsen considered winding the company down and handing its XRP to shareholders before deciding to fight the 2020 lawsuit.
items.title_zh: Ripple首席执行官表示，曾考虑关闭XRP并将其交给股东
items.summary_zh: Ripple 的 Brad Garlinghouse 表示，在决定应对 2020 年的诉讼之前，他和联合创始人 Chris Larsen 考虑过关闭公司并将其 XRP 交给股东。

items.title: Lending protocol Bonzo loses 77% of value locked as $9 million oracle exploit rattles Hedera
items.summary: Bonzo Lend lost approximately $9.05 million after an attacker exploited a verification flaw in a third-party Supra oracle contract on the Hedera network.
items.title_zh: 900 万美元的预言机漏洞令 Hedera 不安，借贷协议 Bonzo 损失了 77% 的锁定价值
items.summary_zh: 攻击者利用 Hedera 网络上的第三方 Supra 预言机合约中的验证缺陷后，Bonzo Lend 损失了约 905 万美元。

items.title: Crypto IPO market stalls as capital rotates to AI and macro uncertainty weighs
items.summary: Funding constraints and investor caution, not regulation, are delaying crypto IPOs, according to Cohen & Company Capital Markets' Christian Lopez.
